note: Champions Mindset video library — 90-video trilingual (en/es/pt) architecture across 3 psychological tracks (Motivation · Flow · Resilience), 30 sessions each. video_ref/poster_ref are architecture slots to be populated with storage paths as clips are produced/ingested.
